text:

v1

Moin moin 


kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade KDE Frameworks to 5.86. 

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-KDE-Update-KDE-Frameworks-to-5.86.patch


mfg Tobias
